title: ATTICUS_MPO project-local baseline
content: ATTICUS_MPO project-local state is anchored to the release-candidate branch of drop0ne/atticus-mpo and baseline v5.0.1. The current project-local memory-engine baseline includes PR #99, which introduced compact context-bearing stored memory cells and schema v9 support, and PR #100, which added optional query-aware retrieval hints with deterministic bounded fallback behavior.
context_summary: Durable MPO project-local baseline cell used to test the first non-governance project-local supercell instantiation.
